## Summary

What does this pull request change?

## Validation

How was this tested?

- [ ] `make build`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] Worker build / release packaging smoke check when relevant
- [ ] AE release distribution gate or waiver when binaries/install/release behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs were updated when user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No private repo names, machine paths, or internal-only links were introduced
- [ ] Release/bootstrap behavior was reviewed if worker packaging or install flow changed
